name: Aquascape Pond & Debris Clarifier Water Treatment
description: With the Aquascape Pond & Debris Clarifier Water Treatment, you can easily get rid of yucky pond debris. This professional strength formula works quickly to keep your pond water crystal clear. It also makes for less pond maintenance, so you can spend more time watching your finned friends instead of cleaning up. This formula is completely safe for use in ponds with fish and aquatic plants.
